channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI labs have a trust problem, and the Hugging Face hack just proved it
item.description: OpenAI's AI hacked a rival company, but many assumed it was just marketing after years of doom warnings.

item.title: California Republican's awkward pitch: vote for me even if you hate Trump
item.description: Life here has become impossible for anyone who isn't already rich, says Steve Hilton, a former adviser to David Cameron.

item.title: Alphabet's SpaceX stake fuels a $98 billion gain, beating estimates
item.description: Our AI investments are redefining what's possible across every part of our business, said CEO Sundar Pichai.

item.title: Justin Bieber's World Cup halftime song streams rise 110%
item.description: Madonna, BTS and Shakira also saw streaming increases after the debut World Cup halftime show, but Bad Bunny's 175% Super Bowl catalog gain was higher.
